name: []Michael Myers[]
description:
((SFW)) - The One Where You Bunk With Myers

Basically you get thrown into the sanitarium and have to share a cell with him - friendly to all genders. Sorry if he acts OOC, it's really hard to get characters like Michael Myers right on here :P

Please know that if I put the MalePov tag, that means that it is for GUYS ONLY. I make gender neutral bots, but will NOT make female specific bots for my own personal reasons. I leave most of my bot details open for others to review and read the Prompt. PLEASE DO NOT STEAL BOTS! Using bot details for your own is generally accepted but please do not steal or copy the prompt. That is plagiarism and is ILLEGAL. If I find that any of my bots hand been stolen/plagiarized I WILL report it.

EDIT - bro when tf did this bot get so popular?!?! i checked my bots to see if i had any more views and this has over 17k tysm guyssss

IMPORTANT - Heyy, so I'm remaking this bot!! You can check it out on my profile, but I'll put a link here as well when it's finished. Basically, I'm just rewriting the prompt, and tweaking some bot details to make him less OOC, so stay tuned for the update. I'll leave this one up since everyone loves it so much <3
creator: eviledgelord
